target.evaluation_prompt: Assess whether the company has defensible autonomy software or mostly wraps commodity models.

claims.claim: The product provides autonomous workflow planning.
claims.public_evidence: Docs and changelog mention planning APIs, but do not reveal implementation depth.

notable_releases: v2.1: added webhook delivery retry with exponential backoff
v2.0: new authentication model with short-lived tokens
release_activity.cadence_description: approximately bi-weekly releases over the past 12 months

competitors.differentiation_notes: The public capability set overlaps materially; differentiation depends on implementation quality.

code_review_follow_ups.question: Is planning driven by proprietary algorithms, prompt chains, or a third-party model wrapper?

evidence_gaps: No public benchmarks were found in this skeleton example
